mnemonics.title: BODMAS for Operator Precedence
mnemonics.content: Brackets, Orders/exponents, Division, Multiplication, Addition, Subtraction

mnemonics.title: Postfix Evaluation Steps
mnemonics.content: Push numbers, pop two for operators, compute, push result

mnemonics.title: Parentheses Handling
mnemonics.content: Push '(' onto stack, ')' triggers popping until '(', discard both

mnemonics.title: Postfix as an Assembly Line
mnemonics.content: Operands on conveyor belt, operators process and replace

mnemonics.title: Infix to Postfix Algorithm
mnemonics.content: Scan infix, push operators, pop when higher precedence or ')', append operands

mnemonics.title: Postfix Evaluation Algorithm
mnemonics.content: Scan postfix, push operands, pop two for operators, compute, push result
